description: CompositionBlack and white striped shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron Do not iron on decorationsRefresh your formal wardrobe with this shirt from arrow. This piece gives a face lift to your on-duty staples with its flattering cut and impeccable silhouette. It sits well under a structured blazer for dressy occasions. Wear this with dark or light chinos to alternate between looks when you're heading to work, and style with formal shoes from provogue, available online at myntra. For a stylish fusion of formal and casual, wear this with classic denims, a bold belt and matching casual leather shoes.Model statisticsProduct is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
